title: Acinodendron kappleri
taxonomy: Acinodendron kappleri is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to South America and is known for its unique characteristics. It is classified within the genus Acinodendron, which is a part of the larger family Melastomataceae. The classification of Acinodendron kappleri is based on its morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification within the Melastomataceae family.
